headline: CSX (CSX) Is Upgrading Radnor Yard To Cut Manual Switching
summary: CSX (NasdaqGS:CSX) is upgrading its Radnor Yard in Nashville with additional power-operated switches. The project focuses on reducing manual switching, improving yard control, and supporting safer train movements. The infrastructure work is part of CSX's broader push to modernize operations and yard management. CSX is a major freight railroad company in the eastern United States, and Radnor Yard is an important hub in its network. Rail operators have been putting more attention on...

headline: CSX (CSX) Upgrades Radnor Yard, Is The Stock Now Pricey?
summary: CSX (CSX) is moving forward with a 2026 capital improvement project at its Radnor Yard in Nashville, replacing hand operated switches with power operated units that are controlled directly by the yardmaster to enhance operations and safety. See our latest analysis for CSX. CSX's recent infrastructure work at Radnor Yard comes as the stock trades at $49.92, with a 90-day share price return of 18.57% and a 1-year total shareholder return of 51.21%, indicating that momentum has been building...
